description:
Offered: every other year
Europe today is an introduction to the major themes in modern European history and political science. The focus will be on the roots of contemporary Europe, European politics and economics, ethnic and religious conflict, citizenship and immigration, European culture and Europe’s place in the world and relationship with the United States. Cross-listed with HIST 2206
Note: Credit is not awarded for both HIST 2206 and POLS 2206.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, CV, IHIP
